note: Distribution is the blueprint at 120 (modeling 18, configuring-processes 26, decisions-business-rules 13, forms 6, connectors 7, extensions-integrations 30, managing-development 18, dev-environment 2) scaled by 500/120 with largest-remainder rounding. dev-environment has a minimum floor of 5 because the upstream content cap is real; the platform tolerates dev-environment shortage between 5 and 9.
